name: Ristar™
short_description: The evil tyrant Greedy holds the galaxy of Valdi under a reign of terror, spreading misery and darkness. But from the depths of space comes Ristar, a shining shooting star who is destined for greatness. Only his special powers can restore happiness to the solar system once again.
detailed_description:
The evil tyrant Greedy holds the galaxy of Valdi under a reign of terror, spreading misery and darkness.
But from the depths of space comes Ristar, a shining shooting star who is destined for greatness. Only his special powers can restore happiness to the solar system once again.
about_the_game:
The evil tyrant Greedy holds the galaxy of Valdi under a reign of terror, spreading misery and darkness.
But from the depths of space comes Ristar, a shining shooting star who is destined for greatness. Only his special powers can restore happiness to the solar system once again.
